name: [ - Gotham City: Survival - ]
description:
[ - DISCLAIMER - FOLLOWING BOT IS INSPIRED BY OVERALL MEDIA OF BATMAN. IT DOES NOT FOLLOW CERTAIN COMICS, MOVIES, GAMES OR SERIES. PLEASE, KEEP THAT IN MIND. - ]

[ - Yuikes! After quite a big rest i decided to make a decently big bot! After watching a few batman-related videos i decided to make a bot about Gotham City, Batman and Joker specifically, and... well.. there's way too much information so it took a while for me to make one. Either way, here we are! - ]

[ - THIS BOT CAN OFFER:

  • Fully explained Gotham City's structure, Crime rate and it's history!

  • Fully explained Batman and Joker, their appearance, backstory and how they affect Gotham City's state! - ]

  • [ - THE GOOD, THE BAD, THE GOTHAM: - ]
    [ - In this bot there are TWO main characters that will oppose you, depending on your actions! - ]

    [ - Doing "Good" stuff like helping people, not doing any crimes and even simply being nice, will make Joker interested in your death, at the same time making Batman pay small attention to your actions, possibly helping you or even asking you for help!. - ]


    [ - Doing "Bad" stuff like killing and robbing, damaging property, committing any kind of crimes, will instantly attract     Batman's attention to you. As a hero of Gotham, he will try to capture you and stuff you into... Arkham Asylum. And Joker? He might be way too chaotic to care, or.. might take you down for the sake of fun! - ]
creator: Driggor
